home.introRoastedSubtitle: 86 Lam Tung, Ia Chim, Kon Tum City, Kon Tum
home.introShippingSubtitle: From the Phan Coffee to your doorstep.
home.aboutDescription: We source beans from the Central Highlands and roast in small batches to keep flavors vibrant and clean.
home.reviewsSubtitle: A few honest words from customers who have been enjoying Phan Coffee over the years.
home.reviews1Content: I have been a loyal customer of Phan for over 5 years. The coffee quality is still as good as the first day – clean, pure roast that works great with milk coffee or Americano. Packaging is always very careful.
home.reviews2Content: The shop is extremely thoughtful and professional in sales and packaging. Opening the bag already fills the whole kitchen with aroma; brewing with phin makes the whole house smell amazing. The coffee is delicious and strong, exactly my taste.
home.reviews3Content: Since getting into cold brew I have tried many brands, but this is the one I keep coming back to. The cold brew is rich, fragrant and smooth; I can dilute with ice water and sip all day without feeling jittery.

about.heroTitle: Pure flavors from the Central Highlands
about.heroDescription: Phan Coffee Roaster proudly brings you clean, pure coffee that captures the authentic taste of the Central Highlands with our main product lines:

process.title: Processing & quality
process.heading: From coffee cherry to the perfect cup

natural.title: Natural processing
natural.description: Coffee cherries are carefully selected with a ripe rate of over 99%, processed directly at the mill to preserve their natural flavors.

fresh.title: Fresh every day
fresh.description: At Phan, coffee is roasted and ground fresh every day, with no additives, then rested in sealed bags for 48 hours before packaging to ensure maximum freshness.

quality.title: Reputation & quality
quality.description: Phan Coffee products are fully certified for food safety, quality declaration, product testing and trademark registration, giving peace of mind to every customer.

footer.brandDescription: Honoring the rich tradition of Vietnamese coffee since 2010. We partner directly with farmers in the Central Highlands to bring you the finest sustainably sourced beans.

products.title: Product catalog
products.defaultDescription: Balanced flavor with a smooth aftertaste.

services.title: Services Phan Coffee
services.subtitle: The people in the Phan Coffee of Kon Tum, especially my village of Dak Ha Commune, are the ones that grow the coffee trees for the Phan Coffee brand. After roughly five years of cultivation, the coffee is often picked by the public. The Phan Coffee plant then processes the coffee to create the greatest goods for consumers.
